channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools
item.description: EPA's CIO says modernized tools and integrated teams help the agency meet the changing needs of the public more easily and consistently. The post EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: TikTok asks the Supreme Court to block the U.S. ban
item.description: TikTok on Monday asked the Supreme Court to step in on an emergency basis to block the federal law that would ban the popular platform in the United States unless its China-based parent company agreed to sell it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Almost a million ConnectOnCall users may have had data stolen by hackers
item.description: 900,000 patients who called doctors out of hours may have had their information stolen following data breach.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 6 ways AI can help UX designers work better—and faster
item.description: Artificial intelligence isn’t creative in the same way that people are. It doesn’t understand inspiration. But that doesn’t mean real UX designers can’t use it. AI can help a designer be more efficient and creative, and do a few more things that might be surprising.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: Tech consultant found guilty of second-degree murder in stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: A San Francisco jury has found a tech consultant is guilty of second-degree murder in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee.
item.dc:creator: Janie Har, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: It’s the end of the internet as we know it—and I feel fine
item.description: The internet feels like it’s falling apart. Not literally. Structurally, it’s sound. There are plenty of fiber optic cables lining ocean floors, cell towers looming above cityscapes, and server-filled data centers.
item.dc:creator: Scott Nover, Fast Company

item.title: Sen. Elizabeth Warren Calls Out Apparent Conflicts of Interest with Elon Musk
item.description: Massachusetts Senator Elizabeth Warren expresses concerns over potential conflicts of interest posed by Elon Musk's role in the Trump administration, asking President-elect Trump to clarify ethics standards.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, The Hill

item.title: Beware, popular Christmas apps are bad for your privacy
item.description: New research unveils that free festive apps collect and share up to five times more data than other paid applications. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Uh oh... Zotac just leaked Nvidia’s next-gen launch line-up, including RTX 5090 GPU with 32GB of VRAM
item.description: Zotac accidentally spills the details on Nvidia’s initial RTX 5000 range – but there’s no RTX 5060 to be seen.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Marvel Rivals' new Winter Celebration game mode will bring Splatoon-like chaos starring Jeff the Land Shark
item.description: NetEase has announced that a brand new, limited-time game mode will be coming to Marvel Rivals this week.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Intel throws shade at Arm PCs, claiming retailers get a ‘large percentage’ of devices returned – but Qualcomm is quick to strike back
item.description: The gloves are off with Copilot+ PCs: Intel and Qualcomm just got into a huge fight over how many Arm PCs are returned.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: John Kirby drone statement 'very misleading at best': New Jersey rep
item.description: Rep. Chris Smith (R- N.J.) slammed White House national security spokesperson John Kirby’s statement about the recent mysterious drone sightings on the East Coast. “Well, I think it's very misleading at best," Smith said in an interview on NewsNation's "The Hill" on Monday evening.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nothing indicates 'public safety risk' from drone sightings: Kirby
item.description: National security communications adviser John Kirby reiterated Monday there is no indication the recent drone sightings pose a risk to public safety.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: The OpenAI Conundrum: A Conflict of Interest?
item.description: Meta and xAI join forces against OpenAI, sparking a controversy over the company's for-profit status.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How ride-hailing apps are replacing school buses
item.description: Ismael El-Amin was driving his daughter to school when a chance encounter gave him an idea for a new way to carpool. On the way across Chicago, El-Amin’s daughter spotted a classmate riding with her own dad as they drove to their selective public school on the city’s North Side.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: CISA lays out how agencies, industry should respond to major cyber incidents
item.description: The draft national cyber incident response plan comes eight years after the last update, and more than six years after the creation of CISA itself. The post CISA lays out how agencies, industry should respond to major cyber incidents first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Founder mode can’t work. Be maximalist
item.description: The tech industry was recently abuzz with a post from Y Combinator founder Paul Graham on “founder mode.
item.dc:creator: Bipul Sinha, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok asks the Supreme Court for an emergency order to block a US ban unless it's sold
item.description: TikTok is asking the Supreme Court to step in on an emergency basis to block the federal law that would ban the popular platform in the United States unless its China-based parent company agrees to sell it.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sherman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: NotebookLM Plus is now available to Google Workspace customers
item.description: A new premium version of Google’s NotebookLM AI assistant is now available to Google Workspace customers. Google unveiled NotebookLM last year, initially under the name Project Tailwind, and began testing the AI-powered “notebook” with select users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI app helps you turn anything into LEGO models
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
